notes: Chariot finale cards. The bus fails in distinctive ways — out of fuel before the depot, a passenger went past their stop, the route deviated.

finales.title: OUT OF FUEL
finales.flavor: The bus is on the shoulder, two miles from the depot. The fuel gauge is below the line. The passengers are quiet. Cora reaches for the CB. The CB is just hum. The cicadas outside the bus are very loud.

finales.title: THE DRIVER DRIFTED
finales.flavor: Cora has been on the road for nine hours. The lane markers blur. The bus drifts into the breakdown lane. She catches it. She stops. The passengers are quiet. She turns the engine off. She gets out. She does not get back in for a long while.

finales.title: THE PASSENGER WENT PAST
finales.flavor: Three passengers rode past the stop they paid for. The late-shift worker is one of them. The lost traveler is one of them. The third one Cora doesn't recognize. The next-town depot is awake. They will figure it out.

finales.title: THE ROUTE RAN LONG
finales.flavor: Five AM. The bus is at the destination depot. The next driver is waiting in the lot with a thermos. The passengers all got off at their stops. The trip was the trip. The route ran longer than it should have.

post_loss_behavior.note: Cora's losses carry a little residual fuel forward. The bus remembers.
